authors: Christoph Graf; Federico Quaglia; Frank A. Wolak
note: Frank Wolak's own CV (fawolak.org/pages/papers.html) lists 'Simplified Market Mechanisms for Non-Convex Markets: Evidence from Italian Electricity Market' as an unpublished working paper (Jan 2020, revised Oct 2021 and May 2023); no journal placement. Related NBER WP w27262 ('Simplified Electricity Market Models with Significant Intermittent Renewable Capacity: Evidence from Italy'). No R&R/acceptance found on CV.

authors: Pierre Dubois; Ashvin Gandhi; Shoshana Vasserman
note: NBER WP 30053 / CEPR DP17293 / TSE WP. Checked Vasserman's site and Gandhi's UCLA Anderson faculty page (which lists R&R status for his other papers but shows this one only as a working paper). No journal acceptance or R&R found as of July 2026.

Tong Liu's own research page (sites.google.com/view/tongl/research) lists the paper under Working Papers as 'Reject and Resubmit at American Economic Review'. Reject-and-resubmit counts as R&R. Sole author.

authors: Kory Kroft; Yao Luo; Magne Mogstad; Bradley Setzler
note: Published in American Economic Review, Vol. 115, No. 9 (2025), pp. 2926-69, per the AEA article page. Originally NBER WP 27325.
Richert's own research page lists the paper as 'Revision Requested at Journal of Political Economy' (a revision was invited = R&R). Sole author.

published_title: Estimating an Auction Platform Game with Two-Sided Entry
note: Published in Journal of Political Economy, Vol. 133, No. 6 (June 2025), per journals.uchicago.edu. Sole author. Title identical except capitalization ('Two-Sided').

authors: Jose M. Betancourt; Ali Hortaçsu; Aniko Oery; Kevin R. Williams
note: Kevin Williams' research page lists 'Dynamic Price Competition: Theory and Evidence from Airline Markets' (Cowles CFDP 2341, April 2023) as a 'resting paper' and a related descendant 'Dynamic Price Competition with Capacity Constraints' (Cowles CFDP 2394, June 2024) as submitted; neither is accepted/R&R at a named journal. NBER WP 30347. Full author list recovered (agenda omitted Betancourt).

authors: Klaus M. Miller; Navdeep S. Sahni; Avner Strulov-Shlain
note: Sahni's Stanford GSB research page lists the paper as 'Revise and Resubmit at American Economic Review'; consistent with Klaus Miller's page. NBER/BFI WP 2022-44, SSRN 4065098.

authors: Gautam Gowrisankaran; Ashley Langer; Wendan Zhang
note: Published in Journal of Political Economy, Vol. 133, No. 6 (2025), per journals.uchicago.edu. Originally NBER WP 30297.

published_title: Multidimensional Screening for Quality with an Application to Health Insurance
authors: Hector Chade; Victoria R. Marone; Amanda Starc; Jeroen Swinkels
note: Victoria Marone's website (victoriamarone.com) lists the paper (retitled 'Multidimensional Screening for Quality with an Application to Health Insurance', NBER WP 30542) as 'Rejected and resubmitted at American Economic Review'. Reject-and-resubmit counts as R&R.

Accepted at Review of Economic Studies; available as advance access (DOI 10.1093/restud/rdaf093, online 2025) but not yet assigned to a numbered print issue, so classified forthcoming/in-press rather than published. NBER WP 29993. (Full title on publisher: 'Demand Analysis under Latent Choice Constraints'.)
Published in American Economic Review, Vol. 116, No. 5 (May 2026), pp. 1723-64, per the AEA article page. Originally NBER WP 31495.

Tiew's research pages (Harvard scholar and NYU Google Site) list the paper (her job market paper) under Working Papers; latest draft March 2024, also Cowles Foundation. No journal acceptance or R&R indicated. Sole author.

published_title: Do Mergers and Acquisitions Improve Efficiency? Evidence from Power Plants
note: Accepted at Journal of Political Economy; journals.uchicago.edu shows it as a 'just accepted' manuscript (Vol 0, No ja, DOI 10.1086/740222), i.e. accepted/in-press, not yet in an issue. NBER WP 32727. Published title adds a question mark ('...Improve Efficiency?').
